/usr/bin/ar qc libminidb_core.a CMakeFiles/minidb_core.dir/src/storage/disk_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_core.dir/src/storage/buffer_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_core.dir/src/storage/heap_file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_core.dir/src/index/bplus_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_core.dir/src/query/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_core.dir/src/query/optimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_core.dir/src/query/executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_core.dir/src/transaction/lock_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_core.dir/src/transaction/tx_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_core.dir/src/recovery/wal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_core.dir/src/recovery/recovery.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_core.dir/src/replication/primary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_core.dir/src/replication/replica.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libminidb_core.a
